steps.title: Use the contrast signal
steps.content: Despite introduces a contrast. The first part mentions criticism that Mandela should have made more structural changes, so the blank must describe a positive response that contrasts with that criticism.

steps.title: Choose a praise word
steps.content: A is neutral, B repeats the negative idea, and D only suggests a changed interpretation. Lauded means praised or celebrated, which directly contrasts with the criticism. The answer is C.
